topic: The street signs on my block have been changing letter by letter for three months
title: The Street Signs on My Block Have Been Changing One Letter at a Time for Three Months | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The street signs on my block change one letter every week. I have photos.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green metal street sign on a residential corner showing white reflective letters reading MAPLE LADE, mounted on a city pole, overcast sky, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Maple Lane. Or it was. The sign now says Maple Lade.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a quiet suburban residential street in early morning, single story houses, a green street sign visible at the corner, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walk it every morning. Same route.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a sidewalk with a person's lower legs and walking shoes mid stride, a long morning shadow cast on the concrete, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First it read Mople. Thought it was vandalism. Photographed it. Moved on.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen displaying a saved photograph of a street sign reading MOPLE LANE, the phone held at desk height, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next week it read Mople Lade.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a green metal street sign with white reflective letters reading MOPLE LADE, the metal surface unblemished, no signs of scratching, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The letters had not been scratched. The metal was original. The change was clean.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of weathered street sign metal under daylight, the lettering crisp and original looking, no graffiti or paint damage, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of two neighbors talking in a driveway in afternoon light, both seen from behind, no faces visible, the street sign visible in the distance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled delivery records. Amazon has been shipping to Mople Lade for two weeks.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a desktop monitor showing an order confirmation page with an obscured address line reading MOPLE LADE, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Google Street View archive still says Maple Lane. Today it says Mople Lade too.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen displaying Google Street View at a residential intersection, the archive timeline slider visible at the bottom of the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Friday the sign read Mople Lade. Monday it reads Mople Made. I have not been outside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green street sign reading MOPLE MADE at dusk, the corner street pole prominent, slightly out of focus background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My mailbox has letters addressed to that name now.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a metal residential mailbox half open with envelopes spilling out, the addresses partially visible, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One letter left to change. I do not want to know the final word.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green street sign at twilight reading MOPLE MADE, the final letter slightly blurred as if mid transformation, vertical 9:16 framing
